highlights: CurXor OS 0.1.0 — Flight Command dashboard with Home hub and nine Claw verticals + The Forge
Life & family verticals — Vital Claw (longevity desk) and Kin Claw (household profiles)
Simple/Expert UI modes, grouped Claw navigation, Settings hub, and chat workspaces with skill buttons
The Forge — natural-language agent factory wired to eno2 egress bridges
Dual-port networking: eno1 Command · eno2 Egress kill switch
Agent runtime v0.2 — SOUL/USER/MEMORY workspace, skills, heartbeat scheduler, and channel gateway
Unified communications — Telegram, Slack, WhatsApp, iMessage, and dashboard chat share one router and CCP inbox
Kin channel handles route external senders to household profiles; unified inbox on Home and Outreach Claw
Creator Claw day-one — Go Live checklist, content queue, multi-platform bridges, engage loop, and analytics
Universal experience levels — Beginner, Standard, Expert across all OOTB Claws
Wearables and health devices via user-configured OAuth; MCP tool protocol; Playwright browser automation on eno2
57 automated QA checks — smoke, user flows, typecheck, and production build
